CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-08-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JACQ M. WILSON of Allan M. Schuman & Associates, Tel No. (415) 563-2111 appearing for Plaintiff;
Atty. MARIA M. LAM of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP, Tel No. (510) 433-2600 appearing for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is denied. Defendant failed to maintain its burden of production. To prevail on this motion, Defendant is obliged to show that Plaintiff's claims "cannot be established." (CCP 437c(p)(2)). At Defendant's Undisputed Material Facts 4 and 6, Plaintiff and Mr. Yasin clearly identify Defendant's van as the vehicle involved in the accident. The trier of fact will determine whether defendant's van caused the injury or whether plaintiff and his witness misidentified the van. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to January 2, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B.
